exportPreview.title: Export Asterisk configuration
exportPreview.description: Review pjsip.conf, pjsip MySQL, extensions.conf, ARA SQL, queues.conf, and queues MySQL before downloading. The contexts in pjsip.conf are reused as landing contexts in extensions.conf, and queues.conf / queues MySQL contain the call-group definitions used by the dialplan.

fsExportPreview.title: Export FreeSWITCH configuration
fsExportPreview.description: Review dialplan XML, MongoDB dialplan documents, Sofia profile, mod_callcenter queues and their SQL push scripts before downloading.

autoTagsSection.title: Auto Tags

integrations.title: Explore Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Get the most out of Maqsam by connecting it with your favorite apps.

hubspot.desc: Maqsam's integration with HubSpot allows you to sync and log call information seamlessly, helping your team work efficiently and access customer details instantly.

zendesk.desc: Maqsam's Zendesk integration lets you log and sync all your call details, helping your team work efficiently and reach customer information easily.

zoho.desc: Maqsam's Zoho CRM integration documents calls as activities, syncs recordings, and enables click-to-call for smooth direct dialing.

salesloft.desc: Maqsam's Salesloft integration documents call details, adds recordings, creates activities, and enables click-to-call for a seamless customer experience.

pipedrive.desc: Maqsam's Pipedrive integration logs your calls into your Pipedrive database, helping you track the sales pipeline and close deals effectively.

intercom.desc: Connect Maqsam with Intercom to simplify customer communication, document calls, and manage conversations easily.

salesforce.desc: Maqsam's Salesforce integration documents call details, adds recordings, creates activities, and enables instant click-to-call dialing.

freshdesk.desc: Maqsam integrates seamlessly with Freshdesk, automatically creating a ticket for every call with all the customer call details included.

anonHelp.title: Enable Anonymous sign-ins in VoiceBot Studio
anonHelp.intro: The Voice Agent feature signs users into the VoiceBot Studio backend anonymously so agents and pipelines can load. That provider is currently disabled in the Studio project, so the page can't connect.
anonHelp.step1: Open the VoiceBot Studio Supabase dashboard using the button below.
anonHelp.footnote: Only a VoiceBot Studio project admin can change this setting.

list.subtitle: Create and manage call queues, routing strategies, assigned skills, and eligible agents.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by queue name, code, or description

empty.title: No queues created yet
empty.body: Create your first queue to define how customer interactions are distributed to qualified agents.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Queue
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete this queue? This action cannot be undone. Existing IVR flows that reference this queue may be affected.

createDialog.title: Create Queue
createDialog.description: Set up the basics now. You can configure skills, agents, and routing in the next step.
createDialog.name: Queue Name
createDialog.codeHelp: Used internally for telephony and routing integration.
createDialog.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

errors.codeFormat: Use uppercase letters, numbers and underscores only.

discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard.body: You have unsaved queue configuration changes. Leaving this page will discard them.

general.title: General Information
general.name: Queue Name
general.codeHelp: Used internally when integrating the queue with telephony and routing systems.
general.descriptionPlaceholder: Handles Arabic-speaking customers who require technical support.
general.groupHelp: Administrative organization only. Does not determine queue membership.
general.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

skills.modeDescription: How agents are matched to interactions in this queue.

modeDesc.skills_based: Only agents matching the required skill rules are eligible.
modeDesc.static: Only manually selected queue members are eligible.
modeDesc.hybrid: Agents must be manually added AND satisfy required skill rules.

skills.staticAlertBody: This queue routes only to manually assigned agents. Skill requirements, qualification logic, and skill relaxation are not used. Manage assigned agents on the Agents tab.
skills.rulesDescription: Define the skills an agent must have to qualify for this queue. The system compares queue requirements with agent skill proficiency levels.
skills.weightCheckBody: Preferred skill weights currently total {{total}}%. They must total 100%.
skills.logicAllDesc: The agent must meet every mandatory skill requirement.
skills.logicAnyDesc: The agent must meet at least one mandatory skill requirement.
skills.logicAnyWarn: Using "Match any" may route interactions to agents who do not have all required capabilities.
skills.exampleDesc: Live preview against the current rules.
skills.relaxDescription: Gradually reduce skill requirements when the customer waits.
skills.relaxWarn: Skill relaxation may route customers to less-qualified agents to reduce waiting time.

agents.staticAlert: Static Members mode: routing is based only on manually assigned agents below. Skill qualification is not used.
agents.qualifiedDesc: {{count}} agents currently qualify for this queue.
agents.noMatch: No agents match the current filters.
agents.manualDesc: Lower penalty values are selected before higher penalty values.
agents.fallbackDesc: Receive the interaction after relaxation or overflow rules are reached.
agents.assignDesc: Select agents to assign to this queue.

settings.slaPreview: Target: Answer {{percent}}% of calls within {{seconds}} seconds

overflow.title: Overflow & Fallback Rules
overflow.desc: What happens when the queue can't handle an interaction.
overflow.circular: This fallback destination creates a circular queue route.

review.fewAgentsWarn: Warning: Only {{count}} agent(s) currently meet all mandatory skill requirements.
review.name: Name

strategyDesc.best_skill_match: Route the interaction to the available agent with the highest skill match score.
strategyDesc.longest_idle: Among qualified agents, select the agent who has been idle the longest.
strategyDesc.fewest_calls: Among qualified agents, select the agent with the fewest handled interactions.
strategyDesc.round_robin: Distribute interactions evenly between qualified agents.
strategyDesc.priority_penalty: Select agents based on queue-member priority or penalty.
strategyDesc.ringall: Ring all available members simultaneously until one answers (Asterisk: ringall).
strategyDesc.leastrecent: Ring the member that was least recently called (Asterisk: leastrecent).
strategyDesc.fewestcalls: Ring the member that has completed the fewest calls (Asterisk: fewestcalls).
strategyDesc.random: Ring a random available member (Asterisk: random).
strategyDesc.rrmemory: Round robin with memory of the last member rung (Asterisk: rrmemory).
strategyDesc.linear: Ring members in the exact order they are configured (Asterisk: linear).
strategyDesc.wrandom: Weighted random selection based on member penalty (Asterisk: wrandom).
